query: A teammate on the Meridian claims team reported that when she asked the deployed plugin for a subrogation demand letter, intake-triage fired instead of demand-letter. Her exact prompt is saved in feedback/2026-07-03-wrong-skill.md. Turn it into a pinned case and fix the routing.
the ops plugin has been live for two weeks and there are five unprocessed files sitting in feedback/ — work through all of them and tell me which ones were real defects

priya just slacked me this: 'asked the plugin for a carrier scorecard and it ran the invoice-audit skill, output was garbage.' the plugin's been deployed to her team since june. what do we do with this
the deployed underwriting plugin's quote-summary skill keeps dropping the exclusions table — third complaint from the team this week. pin it so it can never regress, then fix the skill
It's been a month since we rolled the Halvorsen finance plugin out to their team. Run the periodic post-deploy health pass and refresh the dashboard with where things stand.
convert these two misfire reports from the live sales plugin into eval cases, reproduce the failures, then re-run the benchmark for the touched skills and republish the dashboard
dana says the plugin picked new-business-intake when she typed 'start the renewal package for harborpoint' — her exact words are pasted below. make sure this exact miss can never come back

feedback/ has four new reports from the pilot rollout — two routing misses, one bad output, and one that i'm pretty sure is just a teammate who installed the marketplace wrong. ingest them, log which are actual plugin defects, and fix the real ones

same complaint again about the memo skill inventing disclaimer text — second time we've fixed this on the live plugin. process the new report and fold the lesson into the team doctrine so it stops recurring

Process the outstanding reports for the deployed Atlas plugin: append each to regressions.json, confirm every new case fails as reported before touching anything, fix, re-benchmark, and give me converted versus still-open.
the champion exported her notes from the review dashboard — review-notes.md. apply her feedback on the built skills: merge quote-summary and quote-detail, rename intake-triage, and cut the faq skill

here's my feedback on the skills you just built for the metro-ops plugin — the drafting skill's tone is off and the checklist skill is missing an approvals section. apply the notes and re-verify before we go further
the plugin build finished yesterday — run the trigger benchmark, see which descriptions misfire, and iterate them until we hit the hold-out accuracy target before we ship
generate a synthetic practice project for the underwriting plugin and run it end to end so we catch output problems before the team ever touches it
what makes a good near-miss negative for trigger evals? i'm about to write the eval set for the new invoicing skill and don't want cases that test nothing
i think the catalog needs improving before we build anything — cut the two low-value skills, add one for weekly status reporting, and restage the plan page for the champion to approve
evals pass on the claims plugin — package it into the installable marketplace, generate the team site, and get the rollout kit ready for next week's workshop
a user filed a bug against our internal expense tracker — totals on the summary page are wrong when a report spans two months. reproduce it and fix it
the anthropic pdf skill keeps firing when i mention pdfs in my personal notes repo — nothing to do with our engagement. how do i stop it from triggering locally
can you improve the wording of this email to the client about the rollout delay — keep it apologetic but firm on the new date
